title: Where do my saved templates go?
excerpt:
I’ve saved my template but I can’t find it 
Where do My saved Templates go so I can find it to use it

posts.cookedHtml:

monday.com board templates

6 min read Feature     There are a number of pre-prepared and fully customizable templates that you can choose from whenever you create a new board in your account. Whether you're looking fo...

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: If anyone would like a 15 minute live Zoom tutorial on how to set up and use a Template, I’ll be happy to help out. While you are on trial you have the same features as a Pro account, but without access to monday.labs new features, by the way. PM me if you would like to jump on a Zoom sometime.

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
